name: Minimalist Swiss
author: akellainmotion
description: Helvetica, strict grid, black and white with red accents, generous whitespace

componentOverrides.button: border border-black rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-3 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors
componentOverrides.input: border-b border-black rounded-none bg-transparent focus:border-red-500 px-0 py-2
componentOverrides.link: font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm hover:text-red-500 transition-colors
componentOverrides.badge: border border-black rounded-none font-bold uppercase text-xs tracking-widest px-3 py-1
